## CVE-2022-25647 (Google Gson)

CVE-2022-25647 is a high-severity vulnerability affecting the package com.google.code.gson:gson before version 2.8.9. This vulnerability is related to the deserialization of untrusted data via the writeReplace method in internal classes, which may lead to denial of service (DoS) attacks.

Note that while your search query mentioned Gson 2.9.0, the vulnerability actually affects Gson versions prior to 2.8.9. The vulnerability has been addressed in Google Gson version 2.8.9.

## Retrofit 2.7.2 Context

The search results indicate that Retrofit's last release 2.9.0 (2020) had GSON dependency updates, showing that Retrofit versions depend on Gson and could inherit the CVE-2022-25647 vulnerability if they use vulnerable Gson versions.

## Mitigation

To mitigate this vulnerability, upgrade the com.google.code.gson:gson package to version 2.8.9 or later.

Based on the search results, here's information about pgjdbc versions 42.7.12 and 42.7.13 and their security fixes:

## Version 42.7.12 (Security Release)

CVE-2026-54291 was issued for this release. Under channelBinding=require, the driver silently downgraded from SCRAM-SHA-256-PLUS (with channel binding) to plain SCRAM-SHA-256 (without it) when the server presented a certificate whose signature algorithm has no tls-server-end-point channel-binding hash (e.g. Ed25519, Ed448, or post-quantum algorithms). An attacker who can intercept the TLS connection could exploit this to strip channel-binding protection.

The fix enforces channel binding in the driver's own code: it now fails the connection when no binding data can be extracted, and verifies the negotiated mechanism uses channel binding (-PLUS) when require is set. Only connections that set channelBinding=require are affected. The default prefer policy and releases before 42.7.4 (which introduced channel-binding support) are unaffected.

Additionally, pgjdbc was vulnerable to a client-side denial of service in SCRAM-SHA-256 authentication, where a malicious or compromised PostgreSQL server could specify an extremely large PBKDF2 iteration count, causing the client to consume unbounded CPU and potentially exhaust connection pools. The fix introduces a new scramMaxIterations connection property (defaulting to 100,000) to cap iteration counts before computation begins. CVE-2026-42198 has been issued.

## Version 42.7.13 (Maintenance Release)

The current release is 42.7.13. This is a maintenance release with numerous bug fixes and new connection properties (flushCacheOnDdl, connectExecutor, classLoaderStrategy). It follows the 42.7.12 security release, which fixed a silent channel-binding authentication downgrade (CVE-2026-54291).

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CVE-2023-39017:

## Vulnerability Overview

CVE-2023-39017 is a code injection vulnerability affecting quartz-jobs 2.3.2 and below in the org.quartz.jobs.ee.jms.SendQueueMessageJob.execute component.

## Affected Versions

The latest affected version is 2.3.2 and below. The search results do not specifically mention versions 2.4.0 or 2.5.0 as patched versions.

## Vulnerability Details

Passing an unchecked argument to the SendQueueMessageJob.execute API can lead to the execution of arbitrary commands. By sending a specially crafted request, an attacker could exploit this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code on the system.

## Important Note

This vulnerability is disputed by multiple parties because it is not plausible that untrusted user input would reach the code location where injection must occur.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CVE-2018-1000850 in Square Retrofit:

## Vulnerability Details

Square Retrofit versions from (including) 2.0 to 2.5.0 (excluding) contain a Directory Traversal vulnerability in RequestBuilder class, method addPathParameter.

## Impact

By manipulating the URL an attacker could add or delete resources otherwise unavailable. This attack appears to be exploitable via an encoded path parameter on POST, PUT or DELETE request. More specifically, @Path values could participate in path-traversal, allowing untrusted input passed as a path value to potentially cause the system to make a request to an un-intended relative URL.

## Fix

This vulnerability appears to have been fixed in 2.5.0 and later.

## Severity

CVSS V3 rated as High - 7.5 severity. CVSS V2 rated as High - 6.4 severity.

Note: Your search query mentioned "ReDoS vulnerability," but the search results only document the Directory Traversal vulnerability (CVE-2018-1000850). There may be additional vulnerabilities not covered in these results.

Based on my web search results, I found information about Apache Rampart. Here's what I discovered:

## Apache Rampart Project Status

Apache Rampart provides implementations of the WS-Sec* specifications for Apache Axis2, based on Apache WSS4J and the Apache Axiom DOOM implementation.

Regarding the latest release status: The current release is 1.8.0 and was published on December 01, 2024. Apache Rampart 1.8.0 is a major release designed for compatibility with Axis2 1.8.2, with a huge amount of effort going into upgrading everything possible up to jakarta - namely opensaml to 4.3 and ws-wss4j to 3.0.3.

Regarding version 1.6.3 specifically: Apache Rampart 1.6.3 is a maintenance release compatible with Apache Axis2 1.6.3.

**Note:** Based on these search results, Apache Rampart is **not** retired or moved to the Attic. The project remains active with recent releases, including the 1.8.0 version released in December 2024. The information in your query about Rampart being retired or no longer maintained does not appear to be accurate.

content.text:
I have enough verified data. Here is the per-package remediation verdict.

## Java/Maven dependency vulnerability verdicts

**1. `org.beanshell:bsh` 2.0b5**
- (a) Affected. **CVE-2016-2510** — RCE via Java/XStream deserialization (`XThis.Handler`), CVSS ~8.1. Applies to bsh before 2.0b6.
- (b/c) The fix (2.0b6) was **not published under this groupId**. Maven Central shows `org.beanshell:bsh` topping out at 2.0b5 (dead coordinate). The fixed 2.0b6 was released under **`org.apache-extras.beanshell:bsh:2.0b6`**. Remediation requires switching groupId to `org.apache-extras.beanshell:bsh` 2.0b6 — there is no compatible fix within `org.beanshell`.

**2. `org.bitbucket.b_c:jose4j` 0.9.3**
- (a) Affected. **CVE-2023-51775** — DoS (CPU) via large PBES2 `p2c` count; and **CVE-2024-29371** — DoS via high-compression JWE (`zip`). (Note: CVE-2023-31582, low PBES2 iteration count, was fixed *in* 0.9.3, so 0.9.3 is not affected by it.)
- (b) CVE-2023-51775 is fixed in **0.9.4**; CVE-2024-29371 is fixed in **0.9.6**. Lowest version clearing both: **0.9.6** (same 0.x line, API-compatible).

**3. `org.apache.commons:commons-compress` 1.25.0**
- (a) Affected. **CVE-2024-25710** — DoS infinite loop on corrupted DUMP files; **CVE-2024-26308** — DoS/OOM (unbounded allocation, Pack200/7z).
- (b) Both fixed in **1.26.0** (lowest fixed; 1.26.x/1.27.x also exist). Same major line, drop-in compatible.

**4. `commons-httpclient:commons-httpclient` 3.1**
- (a) Affected. **CVE-2012-5783** — no TLS hostname verification (MITM); **CVE-2011-1498** — proxy credentials/info leak via CONNECT. (The related hostname-verification fix line CVE-2014-3577 belongs to the successor HttpComponents artifact.)
- (c) **No fix in a compatible line.** Project is EOL; 3.1 (2007) is the last release under this groupId/artifact. Remediation requires migrating to the different artifact **`org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient` 4.5.x** (or `org.apache.httpcomponents.client5:httpclient5`), which is an API-breaking change. (Third-party forks like `3.1-atlassian-*` exist but are not upstream.)

**5. Apache Axis2 (`axis2-kernel` / `axis2-transport-http` / `axis2-adb`) — 1.6.1 and 1.6.4**
CVEs are tracked against the Axis2 release version, not per sub-artifact, so the same verdict applies to all three artifacts at a given version.
- **1.6.1**: Affected. **CVE-2012-5351** (SAML signature-exclusion auth bypass), **CVE-2012-5785** (no TLS hostname verification / MITM), **CVE-2012-4418** (XML-signature wrapping, Rampart-related) — all scoped to Axis2 ≤ 1.6.2; plus **CVE-2010-1632** (improper DTD rejection / XXE, scoped to < 1.5.2).
- **1.6.4**: **No known CVE with an assigned ID directly lists 1.6.4 as affected** — it postdates the "≤ 1.6.2" batch and the < 1.5.2 XXE fix. However, admin-console session-fixation (AXIS2-4739) and XSS (AXIS2-5683) hardening landed only in **1.7.4** (no CVE IDs assigned). The 1.6.x line is EOL.
- (b/c) For **1.6.1**, upgrading to **1.6.4** (same minor line) clears the CVE-listed issues above. Since 1.6.x is unmaintained, prefer the maintained same-major line: **1.7.4** (admin-console fixes) or the latest **1.8.2**. All are within major 1, generally source-compatible; no fix requires leaving the 1.x major.

**6. `org.mortbay.jetty:jetty` 6.1.26**
- (a) Affected. Per Snyk/CVE data: URL-encoded **directory traversal** path read (CVE-2005-3747 class), **CVE-2011-4461** (hash-collision form-parameter DoS), and a temp-directory **privilege-escalation** race.
- (c) **No fix in a compatible line.** 6.1.26 (2010) is the last Jetty 6 release and Jetty 6/`org.mortbay.jetty` is end-of-life; the traversal and hash-collision issues have no 6.x fix (the priv-esc race is only fixed at 7.0.0pre4+). Remediation means migrating to the maintained **`org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-server` 9.x/10.x/12.x** coordinate — a different groupId and an API-breaking upgrade.

**7. `org.quartz-scheduler:quartz` 2.3.2**
- (a) Affected. **CVE-2023-39017** — code injection in `org.quartz.jobs.ee.jms.SendQueueMessageJob.execute` (CVSS 9.8), present in quartz-jobs ≤ 2.3.2. **Note it is officially disputed** (requires attacker-controlled scheduler config, not typical untrusted input). (Historical **CVE-2019-13990** XXE was fixed in 2.3.1, so 2.3.2 is not affected by it.)
- (b/c) **No advisory-declared patched version** for CVE-2023-39017; the GitHub advisory lists "patched versions: unknown," and 2.3.2 is the last 2.3.x. Newer **2.4.0 and 2.5.0** releases exist (same major, API-compatible), but no source confirms they remove/fix this code path, and the CVE remains disputed. Practical stance: upgrade within-major to **2.5.0** for general maintenance, but treat CVE-2023-39017 as "no confirmed fix" — mitigate by not exposing `SendQueueMessageJob` to untrusted job data.

**8. `org.jsoup:jsoup` 1.15.3**
- (a) **Not affected by any known CVE.** CVE-2022-36033 (XSS via `javascript:` URLs with `preserveRelativeLinks`) was **fixed in 1.15.3**; CVE-2021-37714 (parser DoS) was fixed back in 1.14.2. No later advisory lists 1.15.3 as vulnerable.
- (b) No security upgrade required. (Newer 1.16.x+ exist but only for features/bugfixes, not a known CVE.)

### Quick summary table
| Package | Version | Vulnerable? | CVEs | Lowest compatible fix |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| org.beanshell:bsh | 2.0b5 | Yes | CVE-2016-2510 | none in this groupId → `org.apache-extras.beanshell:bsh:2.0b6` |
| jose4j | 0.9.3 | Yes | CVE-2023-51775, CVE-2024-29371 | 0.9.6 |
| commons-compress | 1.25.0 | Yes | CVE-2024-25710, CVE-2024-26308 | 1.26.0 |
| commons-httpclient | 3.1 | Yes | CVE-2012-5783, CVE-2011-1498 | none (EOL) → migrate to httpcomponents httpclient 4.5.x |
| axis2 (kernel/http/adb) | 1.6.1 | Yes | CVE-2012-5351, CVE-2012-5785, CVE-2012-4418, CVE-2010-1632 | 1.6.4 clears these; prefer 1.7.4 / 1.8.2 |
| axis2 (kernel/http/adb) | 1.6.4 | No assigned CVE (EOL) | — (admin-console fixes only in 1.7.4, no CVE) | 1.8.2 (maintained) |
| org.mortbay.jetty:jetty | 6.1.26 | Yes | CVE-2005-3747 class, CVE-2011-4461, temp-dir priv-esc | none (EOL) → migrate to org.eclipse.jetty 9.x+ |
| quartz | 2.3.2 | Yes (disputed) | CVE-2023-39017 | no confirmed fix; 2.5.0 same-major but unconfirmed |
| jsoup | 1.15.3 | No | — (CVE-2022-36033 already fixed here) | n/a |

Two remediations require **artifact/coordinate changes rather than a version bump**: `org.beanshell:bsh` (→ `org.apache-extras.beanshell:bsh:2.0b6`) and both dead projects commons-httpclient 3.1 (→ HttpComponents) and Jetty 6 (→ `org.eclipse.jetty`).

content.text:
Verification complete. I cross-checked version existence against the deps.dev Maven API (authoritative, since the raw repo1.maven.org index returned 403) and confirmed CVE affected/fixed ranges against advisory pages (GitHub/Snyk/HeroDevs/NVD/vendor). Note: several packages and CVEs here are dated 2026; I report what the authoritative sources state rather than my training priors.

## Per-package verdicts

**1. org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on 1.84**
- Exists? YES. Confirmed on Maven Central via deps.dev; it is the current latest (published 2026-04-14).
- Affected? NO known unpatched advisory. 1.84 is in fact the *fixed* release for the two most recent BC advisories: CVE-2026-0636 (LDAP injection via parseDN, affected 1.74–1.83) and CVE-2026-5598 (FrodoKEM timing attack, affected 1.71–1.83). Older ones (e.g. CVE-2025-8916, affected ≤1.78) don't reach it.
- Verdict: SAFE, no action. (Your premise that 1.84 might be fictional is wrong — it's real and current.)

**2. org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-core 2.26.0**
- Exists? YES (published 2026-05-02). Latest 2.x is 2.26.1 (2026-06-29).
- Affected? YES — CVE-2025-68161 (missing TLS hostname verification → MITM), fixed in 2.26.1.
- Lowest compatible fix: 2.26.1 (patch bump).

**3. org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk15on 1.70**
- 1.70 (Dec 2021) IS the last-ever jdk15on release — the line was discontinued and renamed to jdk18on. deps.dev confirms 1.70 is the highest jdk15on version.
- CVEs affecting it: CVE-2023-33201 (LDAP injection), CVE-2023-33202 (ASN.1 DoS), CVE-2024-29857 (EC point-import DoS), CVE-2024-30171 (RSA/Bleichenbacher timing), CVE-2024-30172 (Ed25519 infinite loop), CVE-2024-34447 (dNSName handling).
- Fix in a compatible line? NO — none of these are fixed in jdk15on. You must migrate to org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on ≥1.78 (covers all the 2024 CVEs); ideally current 1.84. This is an artifact rename, largely source-compatible but not a same-artifact version bump.

**4. com.thoughtworks.xstream:xstream 1.4.21**
- Exists? YES; it is the latest (2024-11-07).
- Affected? NO — 1.4.21 is the *fix* for CVE-2024-47072 (BinaryStreamDriver stack-overflow DoS). No known newer CVE.
- Verdict: SAFE, no action.

**5. commons-fileupload:commons-fileupload 1.6.0**
- Exists? YES (published 2025-06-05); latest of the 1.x line.
- Affected? NO — 1.6.0 is the *fix* for CVE-2025-48976 (multipart part-header DoS) and is well past CVE-2023-24998 (fixed in 1.5).
- Verdict: SAFE, no action.

**6. com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind 2.18.2**
- Affected? YES — CVE-2026-54512 (PolymorphicTypeValidator allow-list bypass via generic type argument → RCE; affected ≥2.10.0 <2.18.8) and CVE-2026-54515 (per-property @JsonIgnoreProperties case-insensitivity bypass; fixed at 2.18.9).
- Lowest compatible fix: 2.18.9 (covers both; 2.18.8 fixes only the RCE). Patch bump within 2.18.x.

**7. org.postgresql:postgresql 42.7.11**
- Exists? YES (published 2026-04-28). Latest is 42.7.13.
- CVE-2024-1597? NOT affected — that was fixed long ago in 42.7.2, and 42.7.11 > 42.7.2.
- However, 42.7.11 IS affected by newer issues: CVE-2026-54291 (SCRAM channel-binding silent downgrade; only impacts connections using channelBinding=require) and CVE-2026-42198 (SCRAM PBKDF2 iteration-count client-side DoS), both fixed in 42.7.12.
- Lowest compatible fix: 42.7.12 (patch bump).

**8. org.apache.ws.security:wss4j 1.6.19**
- 1.6.19 (2015-10-22) is the LAST release of this (old) groupId/artifact. It already contains the fixes for CVE-2015-0226 (Bleichenbacher countermeasure) and CVE-2015-0227 (requireSignedEncryptedDataElements / signature-wrapping bypass), which landed in 1.6.17 — so 1.6.19 is NOT vulnerable to those.
- Fix only in 2.x? There is no unpatched known CVE on 1.6.19 itself, but the entire 1.x line is EOL/unmaintained. The 2.x/3.x successor is a different groupId (org.apache.wss4j) and is NOT drop-in API-compatible. So: no compatible in-line upgrade exists; the only path forward for maintenance is the 2.x/3.x rewrite.

**9. org.apache.rampart:rampart-core 1.6.3**
- Very old (Axis2 1.6.3 era). It is NOT in the Apache Attic — the project is still nominally alive; latest is 1.8.0 (Dec 2024, which moved to WSS4J 3.0.3 / jakarta).
- Its risk is primarily transitive: 1.6.3 bundles the old WSS4J and old BouncyCastle, inheriting their CVEs. No security patches exist within the 1.6.x line.
- Fix in a compatible line? NO patch-level fix. Remediation requires a major upgrade to Rampart 1.7.1 or 1.8.0, which in turn requires a matching Axis2 upgrade — NOT drop-in compatible.

**10. box-java-sdk 2.17.0 / gson 2.9.0 / retrofit 2.7.2**
- gson 2.9.0: SAFE — CVE-2022-25647 (writeReplace deserialization DoS) was fixed in 2.8.9; 2.9.0 is past it. No action.
- retrofit 2.7.2: SAFE — CVE-2018-1000850 (path traversal via @Path) was fixed in 2.5.0; 2.7.2 is past it. No CVE known to affect 2.7.2 directly.
- box-java-sdk 2.17.0: no dedicated CVE/advisory found for the SDK itself; its only documented exposure is transitive (older BouncyCastle). No advisory-driven action; just keep transitive deps current.

## Quick remediation summary (packages needing a bump)
- log4j-core 2.26.0 → 2.26.1
- jackson-databind 2.18.2 → 2.18.9
- postgresql 42.7.11 → 42.7.12
- bcprov-jdk15on 1.70 → migrate to bcprov-jdk18on ≥1.78 (artifact rename)
- rampart-core 1.6.3 → major upgrade (1.7.1/1.8.0 + Axis2), no in-line fix
- wss4j 1.6.19 → no unpatched CVE, but EOL; 2.x is a non-compatible groupId change

Everything else (bcprov-jdk18on 1.84, xstream 1.4.21, commons-fileupload 1.6.0, gson 2.9.0, retrofit 2.7.2, box-java-sdk 2.17.0) has no known unpatched advisory.

One caveat on method: WebSearch's AI summaries repeatedly parroted query terms (e.g., initially "confirming" fictional-sounding latest versions), so I did not trust them for existence/version claims — those were verified against the deps.dev API, and CVE version ranges against the individual advisory pages.

summary:
Verification complete. I cross-checked version existence against the deps.dev Maven API (authoritative, since the raw repo1.maven.org index returned 403) and confirmed CVE affected/fixed ranges against advisory pages (GitHub/Snyk/HeroDevs/NVD/vendor). Note: several packages and CVEs here are dated 2026; I report what the authoritative sources state rather than my training priors.

## Per-package verdicts

**1. org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on 1.84**
- Exists? YES. Confirmed on Maven Central via deps.dev; it is the current latest (published 2026-04-14).
- Affected? NO known unpatched advisory. 1.84 is in fact the *fixed* release for the two most recent BC advisories: CVE-2026-0636 (LDAP injection via parseDN, affected 1.74–1.83) and CVE-2026-5598 (FrodoKEM timing attack, affected 1.71–1.83). Older ones (e.g. CVE-2025-8916, affected ≤1.78) don't reach it.
- Verdict: SAFE, no action. (Your premise that 1.84 might be fictional is wrong — it's real and current.)

**2. org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-core 2.26.0**
- Exists? YES (published 2026-05-02). Latest 2.x is 2.26.1 (2026-06-29).
- Affected? YES — CVE-2025-68161 (missing TLS hostname verification → MITM), fixed in 2.26.1.
- Lowest compatible fix: 2.26.1 (patch bump).

**3. org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk15on 1.70**
- 1.70 (Dec 2021) IS the last-ever jdk15on release — the line was discontinued and renamed to jdk18on. deps.dev confirms 1.70 is the highest jdk15on version.
- CVEs affecting it: CVE-2023-33201 (LDAP injection), CVE-2023-33202 (ASN.1 DoS), CVE-2024-29857 (EC point-import DoS), CVE-2024-30171 (RSA/Bleichenbacher timing), CVE-2024-30172 (Ed25519 infinite loop), CVE-2024-34447 (dNSName handling).
- Fix in a compatible line? NO — none of these are fixed in jdk15on. You must migrate to org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on ≥1.78 (covers all the 2024 CVEs); ideally current 1.84. This is an artifact rename, largely source-compatible but not a same-artifact version bump.

**4. com.thoughtworks.xstream:xstream 1.4.21**
- Exists? YES; it is the latest (2024-11-07).
- Affected? NO — 1.4.21 is the *fix* for CVE-2024-47072 (BinaryStreamDriver stack-overflow DoS). No known newer CVE.
- Verdict: SAFE, no action.

**5. commons-fileupload:commons-fileupload 1.6.0**
- Exists? YES (published 2025-06-05); latest of the 1.x line.
- Affected? NO — 1.6.0 is the *fix* for CVE-2025-48976 (multipart part-header DoS) and is well past CVE-2023-24998 (fixed in 1.5).
- Verdict: SAFE, no action.

**6. com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind 2.18.2**
- Affected? YES — CVE-2026-54512 (PolymorphicTypeValidator allow-list bypass via generic type argument → RCE; affected ≥2.10.0 <2.18.8) and CVE-2026-54515 (per-property @JsonIgnoreProperties case-insensitivity bypass; fixed at 2.18.9).
- Lowest compatible fix: 2.18.9 (covers both; 2.18.8 fixes only the RCE). Patch bump within 2.18.x.

**7. org.postgresql:postgresql 42.7.11**
- Exists? YES (published 2026-04-28). Latest is 42.7.13.
- CVE-2024-1597? NOT affected — that was fixed long ago in 42.7.2, and 42.7.11 > 42.7.2.
- However, 42.7.11 IS affected by newer issues: CVE-2026-54291 (SCRAM channel-binding silent downgrade; only impacts connections using channelBinding=require) and CVE-2026-42198 (SCRAM PBKDF2 iteration-count client-side DoS), both fixed in 42.7.12.
- Lowest compatible fix: 42.7.12 (patch bump).

**8. org.apache.ws.security:wss4j 1.6.19**
- 1.6.19 (2015-10-22) is the LAST release of this (old) groupId/artifact. It already contains the fixes for CVE-2015-0226 (Bleichenbacher countermeasure) and CVE-2015-0227 (requireSignedEncryptedDataElements / signature-wrapping bypass), which landed in 1.6.17 — so 1.6.19 is NOT vulnerable to those.
- Fix only in 2.x? There is no unpatched known CVE on 1.6.19 itself, but the entire 1.x line is EOL/unmaintained. The 2.x/3.x successor is a different groupId (org.apache.wss4j) and is NOT drop-in API-compatible. So: no compatible in-line upgrade exists; the only path forward for maintenance is the 2.x/3.x rewrite.

**9. org.apache.rampart:rampart-core 1.6.3**
- Very old (Axis2 1.6.3 era). It is NOT in the Apache Attic — the project is still nominally alive; latest is 1.8.0 (Dec 2024, which moved to WSS4J 3.0.3 / jakarta).
- Its risk is primarily transitive: 1.6.3 bundles the old WSS4J and old BouncyCastle, inheriting their CVEs. No security patches exist within the 1.6.x line.
- Fix in a compatible line? NO patch-level fix. Remediation requires a major upgrade to Rampart 1.7.1 or 1.8.0, which in turn requires a matching Axis2 upgrade — NOT drop-in compatible.

**10. box-java-sdk 2.17.0 / gson 2.9.0 / retrofit 2.7.2**
- gson 2.9.0: SAFE — CVE-2022-25647 (writeReplace deserialization DoS) was fixed in 2.8.9; 2.9.0 is past it. No action.
- retrofit 2.7.2: SAFE — CVE-2018-1000850 (path traversal via @Path) was fixed in 2.5.0; 2.7.2 is past it. No CVE known to affect 2.7.2 directly.
- box-java-sdk 2.17.0: no dedicated CVE/advisory found for the SDK itself; its only documented exposure is transitive (older BouncyCastle). No advisory-driven action; just keep transitive deps current.

## Quick remediation summary (packages needing a bump)
- log4j-core 2.26.0 → 2.26.1
- jackson-databind 2.18.2 → 2.18.9
- postgresql 42.7.11 → 42.7.12
- bcprov-jdk15on 1.70 → migrate to bcprov-jdk18on ≥1.78 (artifact rename)
- rampart-core 1.6.3 → major upgrade (1.7.1/1.8.0 + Axis2), no in-line fix
- wss4j 1.6.19 → no unpatched CVE, but EOL; 2.x is a non-compatible groupId change

Everything else (bcprov-jdk18on 1.84, xstream 1.4.21, commons-fileupload 1.6.0, gson 2.9.0, retrofit 2.7.2, box-java-sdk 2.17.0) has no known unpatched advisory.

One caveat on method: WebSearch's AI summaries repeatedly parroted query terms (e.g., initially "confirming" fictional-sounding latest versions), so I did not trust them for existence/version claims — those were verified against the deps.dev API, and CVE version ranges against the individual advisory pages.

    <distributionManagement>
        <repository>
            <id>sonatype-nexus-staging</id>
            <name>Nexus Release Repository</name>
            <url>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2/</url>
        </repository>
        <snapshotRepository>
            <id>sonatype-nexus-snapshots</id>
            <name>Sonatype Nexus Snapshots</name>
            <url>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/content/repositories/snapshots</url>
        </snapshotRepository>
        <site>
          <id>grouper-site</id>
          <name>grouper staging site documentation</name>
          <url>file:${project.site.deployDirectory}</url>
        </site>
    </distributionManagement>

    <build>
        <defaultGoal>install</defaultGoal>

        <plugins> 
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-assembly-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <tarLongFileMode>gnu</tarLongFileMode>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-source-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>source</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-jar-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>test-jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipIfEmpty>true</skipIfEmpty>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

                        <exclude>**/*.html</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.launch</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.schema</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.epf</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.log</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.gsh</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.schemas</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.ldif</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.rc</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.script</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.handlers</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.jjt</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.example</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/etc/init.d/tomcat*</exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>compile</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- see project properties for configLocation -->
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <consoleOutput>true</consoleOutput>
                    <failOnViolation>false</failOnViolation>
                    <linkXRef>false</linkXRef>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>verify</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>

        <pluginManagement>
            <plugins>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-gpg-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-compiler-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source>
                        <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target>
                        <!-- useIncrementalCompilation does the opposite of what you would think. Set to
                             false to not rebuild everything constantly -->
                        <useIncrementalCompilation>false</useIncrementalCompilation>
                        <fork>true</fork>
                        <meminitial>128m</meminitial>
                        <maxmem>512m</maxmem>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-surefire-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <skipTests>${skipTests}</skipTests>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.eluder.coveralls</groupId>
                    <artifactId>coveralls-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${coveralls-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                    <artifactId>cobertura-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${cobertura-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <format>xml</format>
                        <maxmem>256m</maxmem>
                        <!-- aggregated reports for multi-module projects -->
                        <aggregate>true</aggregate>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>

                <!-- for grouper project -->
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.eclipse.m2e</groupId>
                    <artifactId>lifecycle-mapping</artifactId>
                    <version>1.0.0</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                            <pluginExecutions>
                                <pluginExecution>
                                    <pluginExecutionFilter>
                                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                                        <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
                                        <versionRange>[1.3,)</versionRange>
                                        <goals>
                                            <goal>run</goal>
                                        </goals>
                                    </pluginExecutionFilter>
                                    <action>
                                        <ignore />
                                    </action>
                                </pluginExecution>
                            </pluginExecutions>
                        </lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-site-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-site-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-checkstyle-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${nexus-staging-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
            </plugins>
        </pluginManagement>

    </build>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>release</id>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-source-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>attach-sources</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>jar</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-javadoc-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>release-javadoc</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>javadoc</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                            <execution>
                                <id>attach-javadocs</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>jar</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                        <configuration>
                            <minmemory>128m</minmemory>
                            <maxmemory>1g</maxmemory>
                            <!-- (for version < 3) <additionalparam>-Xdoclint:none</additionalparam>-->
                            <doclint>none</doclint>
                            <quiet>true</quiet>
                            <author>false</author>
                            <version>true</version>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>sign-artifacts</id>
                                <phase>verify</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>sign</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-deploy-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skip>true</skip>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <extensions>true</extensions>
                        <configuration>
                            <serverId>sonatype-nexus-staging</serverId>
                            <nexusUrl>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/</nexusUrl>
                            <!-- staging profile for edu.internet2.middleware.grouper -->
                            <stagingProfileId>87a160186f8901</stagingProfileId>
                            <keepStagingRepositoryOnCloseRuleFailure>true</keepStagingRepositoryOnCloseRuleFailure>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <reporting>
        <plugins>
                <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-javadoc-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- detectJavaApiLink defaults to true, so this may not need to be set -->
                    <!--
                    <links>
                        <link>http://java.sun.com/j2se/1.6.0/docs/api/</link>
                    </links>
                    -->
                    <quiet>true</quiet>
                    <author>false</author>
                    <version>true</version>
                    <doctitle>${project.name} ${project.version} Java API.</doctitle>
                    <windowtitle>${project.name} ${project.version} Java API.</windowtitle>
                    <overview>src/main/java/overview.html</overview>
                    <minmemory>128m</minmemory>
                    <maxmemory>1g</maxmemory>
                    <!-- (for version < 3) <additionalparam>-Xdoclint:none</additionalparam>-->
                    <doclint>none</doclint>
                    <!-- prevent every javadoc file changing on each run -->
                    <notimestamp>true</notimestamp>
                    <!-- prevent the footer from autoincrementing the year; keep it consistent with the original gh-pages -->
                    <bottom><![CDATA[Copyright © 2016 <a href="http://www.internet2.edu/">Internet2</a>. All rights reserved.]]></bottom>
                </configuration>
                <reportSets>
                    <reportSet>
                        <id>default</id>

                            <report>javadoc</report>
                            <report>test-javadoc</report>
                        </reports>
                    </reportSet>
                    <reportSet>
                        <id>aggregate</id>
                        <reports>
                            <report>aggregate</report>
                        </reports>
                    </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-project-info-reports-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-projectinfo-reports-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>index</report>
                      <report>team</report>
                      <report>mailing-lists</report>
                      <report>issue-management</report>
                      <report>licenses</report>
                      <report>scm</report>
                      <!--<report>summary</report>-->
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jxr-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-jxr-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <inherited>false</inherited>
                    <reports>
                      <report>jxr</report>
                      <report>test-jxr</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
              </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>versions-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-versions-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>dependency-updates-report</report>
                      <report>plugin-updates-report</report>
                      <report>property-updates-report</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>taglist-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-taglist-plugin.version}</version>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.owasp</groupId>
                <artifactId>dependency-check-maven</artifactId>
                <version>${dependency-check-maven-plugin.varsion}</version>
                  <configuration>
                    <!-- the grouper module has a dependency on ant, which depends on com.sun tools.jar. The
                                error can be avoided by skipping checks for system scope dependencies
                               (note: show usage with `mvn dependency:tree -Dincludes=com.sun:tools -f grouper-parent`)
                    -->
                    <skipSystemScope>true</skipSystemScope>
                    <!-- skip .net assembly checking to avoid warning ".NET Assembly Analyzer could not be initialized
                                and at least one 'exe' or 'dll' was scanned ..."
                    -->
                    <assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>false</assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>
                  </configuration>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>aggregate</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </reporting>

            <dependency>
              <groupId>org.ldaptive</groupId>

        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <distributionManagement>
        <repository>
            <id>sonatype-nexus-staging</id>
            <name>Nexus Release Repository</name>
            <url>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2/</url>
        </repository>
        <snapshotRepository>
            <id>sonatype-nexus-snapshots</id>
            <name>Sonatype Nexus Snapshots</name>
            <url>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/content/repositories/snapshots</url>
        </snapshotRepository>
        <site>
          <id>grouper-site</id>
          <name>grouper staging site documentation</name>
          <url>file:${project.site.deployDirectory}</url>
        </site>
    </distributionManagement>

    <build>
        <defaultGoal>install</defaultGoal>

        <plugins> 
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-assembly-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <tarLongFileMode>gnu</tarLongFileMode>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-source-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>source</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-jar-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>test-jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipIfEmpty>true</skipIfEmpty>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <!--
            <plugin>
                <groupId>com.mycila</groupId>
                <artifactId>license-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-license-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <!** we don't need to run this every time; use `-Dlicense.skip=false` **>
                    <skip>true</skip>
                    <header>https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Internet2/grouper/master/LICENSE.txt</header>
                    <failIfMissing>false</failIfMissing>
                    <skipExistingHeaders>true</skipExistingHeaders>
                    <strictCheck>true</strictCheck>
                    <aggregate>true</aggregate>
                    <mapping>

                    </mapping>

                        <exclude>**/*.ldif</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.rc</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.script</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.handlers</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.jjt</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/*.example</exclude>
                        <exclude>**/etc/init.d/tomcat*</exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>compile</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- see project properties for configLocation -->
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                    <consoleOutput>true</consoleOutput>
                    <failOnViolation>false</failOnViolation>
                    <linkXRef>false</linkXRef>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>verify</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>

        <pluginManagement>
            <plugins>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-gpg-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-compiler-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source>
                        <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target>
                        <!-- useIncrementalCompilation does the opposite of what you would think. Set to
                             false to not rebuild everything constantly -->
                        <useIncrementalCompilation>false</useIncrementalCompilation>
                        <fork>true</fork>
                        <meminitial>128m</meminitial>
                        <maxmem>512m</maxmem>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-surefire-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <skipTests>${skipTests}</skipTests>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.eluder.coveralls</groupId>
                    <artifactId>coveralls-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${coveralls-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                    <artifactId>cobertura-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${cobertura-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <format>xml</format>
                        <maxmem>256m</maxmem>
                        <!-- aggregated reports for multi-module projects -->
                        <aggregate>true</aggregate>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>

                <!-- for grouper project -->
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.eclipse.m2e</groupId>
                    <artifactId>lifecycle-mapping</artifactId>
                    <version>1.0.0</version>
                    <configuration>
                        <lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                            <pluginExecutions>
                                <pluginExecution>
                                    <pluginExecutionFilter>
                                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                                        <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
                                        <versionRange>[1.3,)</versionRange>
                                        <goals>
                                            <goal>run</goal>
                                        </goals>
                                    </pluginExecutionFilter>
                                    <action>
                                        <ignore />
                                    </action>
                                </pluginExecution>
                            </pluginExecutions>
                        </lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                    </configuration>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-site-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-site-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${maven-checkstyle-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
                <plugin>
                    <groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
                    <artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                    <version>${nexus-staging-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                </plugin>
            </plugins>
        </pluginManagement>

    </build>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>release</id>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-source-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>attach-sources</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>jar</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-javadoc-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>release-javadoc</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>javadoc</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                            <execution>
                                <id>attach-javadocs</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>jar</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                        <configuration>
                            <minmemory>128m</minmemory>
                            <maxmemory>1g</maxmemory>
                            <!-- (for version < 3) <additionalparam>-Xdoclint:none</additionalparam>-->
                            <doclint>none</doclint>
                            <quiet>true</quiet>
                            <author>false</author>
                            <version>true</version>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>sign-artifacts</id>
                                <phase>verify</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>sign</goal>
                                </goals>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-deploy-plugin</artifactId>
                        <configuration>
                            <skip>true</skip>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <extensions>true</extensions>
                        <configuration>
                            <serverId>sonatype-nexus-staging</serverId>
                            <nexusUrl>https://ossrh-staging-api.central.sonatype.com/</nexusUrl>
                            <!-- staging profile for edu.internet2.middleware.grouper -->
                            <stagingProfileId>87a160186f8901</stagingProfileId>
                            <keepStagingRepositoryOnCloseRuleFailure>true</keepStagingRepositoryOnCloseRuleFailure>
                        </configuration>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <reporting>
        <plugins>
                <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-javadoc-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- detectJavaApiLink defaults to true, so this may not need to be set -->
                    <!--
                    <links>
                        <link>http://java.sun.com/j2se/1.6.0/docs/api/</link>
                    </links>
                    -->
                    <quiet>true</quiet>
                    <author>false</author>
                    <version>true</version>
                    <doctitle>${project.name} ${project.version} Java API.</doctitle>
                    <windowtitle>${project.name} ${project.version} Java API.</windowtitle>
                    <overview>src/main/java/overview.html</overview>
                    <minmemory>128m</minmemory>
                    <maxmemory>1g</maxmemory>
                    <!-- (for version < 3) <additionalparam>-Xdoclint:none</additionalparam>-->
                    <doclint>none</doclint>
                    <!-- prevent every javadoc file changing on each run -->
                    <notimestamp>true</notimestamp>
                    <!-- prevent the footer from autoincrementing the year; keep it consistent with the original gh-pages -->
                    <bottom><![CDATA[Copyright © 2016 <a href="http://www.internet2.edu/">Internet2</a>. All rights reserved.]]></bottom>
                </configuration>
                <reportSets>
                    <reportSet>
                        <id>default</id>
                        <reports>
                            <report>javadoc</report>

                        </reports>
                    </reportSet>
                    <reportSet>
                        <id>aggregate</id>
                        <reports>
                            <report>aggregate</report>
                        </reports>
                    </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-project-info-reports-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-projectinfo-reports-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>index</report>
                      <report>team</report>
                      <report>mailing-lists</report>
                      <report>issue-management</report>
                      <report>licenses</report>
                      <report>scm</report>
                      <!--<report>summary</report>-->
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jxr-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-jxr-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <inherited>false</inherited>
                    <reports>
                      <report>jxr</report>
                      <report>test-jxr</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
              </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>versions-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-versions-plugin.version}</version>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>dependency-updates-report</report>
                      <report>plugin-updates-report</report>
                      <report>property-updates-report</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>taglist-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-taglist-plugin.version}</version>
              </plugin>
              <plugin>
                <groupId>org.owasp</groupId>
                <artifactId>dependency-check-maven</artifactId>
                <version>${dependency-check-maven-plugin.varsion}</version>
                  <configuration>
                    <!-- the grouper module has a dependency on ant, which depends on com.sun tools.jar. The
                                error can be avoided by skipping checks for system scope dependencies
                               (note: show usage with `mvn dependency:tree -Dincludes=com.sun:tools -f grouper-parent`)
                    -->
                    <skipSystemScope>true</skipSystemScope>
                    <!-- skip .net assembly checking to avoid warning ".NET Assembly Analyzer could not be initialized
                                and at least one 'exe' or 'dll' was scanned ..."
                    -->
                    <assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>false</assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>
                  </configuration>
                <reportSets>
                  <reportSet>
                    <reports>
                      <report>aggregate</report>
                    </reports>
                  </reportSet>
                </reportSets>
              </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </reporting>

    <!-- Project Metadata -->

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

  <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
  <artifactId>grouper-installer</artifactId>
  <name>Grouper Installer</name>
  <description>The Grouper installer</description>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  
  <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
  </parent>

    <!-- Project Metadata (override parent default) -->
    <url>https://spaces.internet2.edu/display/Grouper/Grouper+Installer</url>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-codec</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-codec</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-compress</artifactId>
            <version>1.25.0</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-httpclient</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-httpclient</artifactId>
            <version>3.1</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.tukaani</groupId>
            <artifactId>xz</artifactId>
            <version>1.9</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>
    <build>
    <sourceDirectory>src/java</sourceDirectory>
    <testSourceDirectory>src/test</testSourceDirectory>
    <resources>
        <resource>
            <directory>conf</directory>
            <includes>
                    <include>**/*</include>
            </includes>
        </resource>
    </resources>
    <testResources>
        <testResource>
            <directory>testFiles</directory>
            <includes>
                <include>**/*</include>
            </includes>
        </testResource>
    </testResources>
    <plugins>
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
            <configuration>
                <archive>
                    <index>true</index>
                    <manifestEntries>
                        <Main-Class>edu.internet2.middleware.grouperInstaller.GrouperInstaller</Main-Class>
                        <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                        <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                        <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                        <Implementation-URL>${project.url}</Implementation-URL>
                        <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                    </manifestEntries>
                </archive>
            </configuration>
        </plugin>
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId>
            <version>3.5.1</version>
            <executions>
                <execution>
                    <phase>package</phase>
                    <goals>
                        <goal>shade</goal>
                    </goals>
                    <configuration>
                        <minimizeJar>false</minimizeJar>
                        <filters>
                            <filter>
                                <artifact>*:*</artifact>
                                <excludes>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/DEPENDENCIES</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/LICENSE</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/LICENSE.txt</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/NOTICE</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/NOTICE.txt</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/README.txt</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/org/apache/**</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/services/**</exclude>
                                    <exclude>META-INF/versions/**</exclude>
                                </excludes>
                            </filter>
                            <filter>
                                <artifact>commons-codec:commons-codec</artifact>
                                <excludes>
                                    <exclude>org/apache/commons/codec/language/bm/*.txt</exclude>
                                </excludes>
                            </filter>
                            <filter>
                                <artifact>org.apache.commons:commons-compress</artifact>
                                <excludes>
                                    <exclude>org/apache/commons/compress/archivers/examples/**</exclude>
                                    <exclude>org/apache/commons/compress/harmony/**</exclude>
                                </excludes>
                            </filter>
                            <filter>
                                <artifact>org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-core</artifact>
                                <excludes>
                                    <exclude>org/apache/logging/log4j/core/**</exclude>
                                </excludes>
                            </filter>
                            <filter>
                                <artifact>org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-api</artifact>
                                <excludes>
                                    <exclude>org/apache/logging/log4j/**</exclude>
                                </excludes>
                            </filter>
                        </filters>
                        <relocations>
                            <relocation>
                                <pattern>org.apache</pattern>
                                <shadedPattern>edu.internet2.middleware.grouperInstallerExt.org.apache</shadedPattern>
                            </relocation>
                            <relocation>
                                <pattern>org.tukaani</pattern>
                                <shadedPattern>edu.internet2.middleware.grouperInstallerExt.org.tukaani</shadedPattern>
                            </relocation>
                        </relocations>
                    </configuration>
                </execution>
            </executions>
        </plugin>

    </plugins>
  </build>
</project>

        </snapshotRepository>
        <site>
          <id>grouper-site</id>
          <name>grouper staging site documentation</name>
          <url>file:${project.site.deployDirectory}</url>
        </site>
    </distributionManagement>

    <build>
        <defaultGoal>install</defaultGoal>

        <plugins> 
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-assembly-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <tarLongFileMode>gnu</tarLongFileMode>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-source-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>source</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-jar-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>test-jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <skipIfEmpty>true</skipIfEmpty>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <!--
